name: Task Scheduler
description: Schedule a task or prompt to run at a future time, after a delay, or on a recurring interval. Use this to set reminders, run periodic checks, or defer non-urgent work. The scheduled task will be submitted to the AI with the same LLM config.

prompt.description: The task/prompt to execute at the scheduled time.

delay_seconds.description: Seconds to wait before executing. Use 0 for immediate background execution.

repeat_interval_seconds.description: If set, repeat the task every N seconds. 0 = no repeat.

max_repeats.description: Maximum number of repetitions. 0 = unlimited. Only used when repeat_interval_seconds > 0.

label.description: A human-readable name for this scheduled task (for tracking).
